action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Billings, Joers, Mayadev, Brill, Dittrich, Armstrong, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, McCarville, Miresse, Ortiz-Velez, Prado, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stubbs, Subeck and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Jacque, L. Johnson, Dassler-Alfheim, Roys and Spreitzer
